author: David Huu Pham
text: Classification: scope=cross-cutting (4 packages: root, pkg/ptypes, internal/sqlite, internal/helpers), complexity=medium (established pattern, mechanical expansion), risk=internal-only (test-only changes, no production code modifications except potential bug fixes found by tests), novelty=low (extending existing YAML fixture pattern from pkg/namespace)

author: David Huu Pham
text: Research depth: Quick scan (user confirmed). Rationale: established pattern from pkg/namespace, mechanical expansion across 4 packages, test-only changes.

author: David Huu Pham
text: Research findings (quick scan): Pattern established in pkg/namespace — YAML via go:embed + yaml.v3, combinatorial expansion via nested loops + t.Run(). testutil package provides OpenTestDB, MakeTask, MakeTaskID helpers. All packages use black-box testing. No new patterns needed.

author: David Huu Pham
text: Explore findings (quick scan): All 8 targets analyzed. Key axes: UpdateTask has 7 optional pointer fields (2^7 SET clause combos), ListTasks has 6 filter fields (2^6 WHERE clause combos), Create validates namespace + passes 3 enums through, parseID has 3 error branches + 4 ID types, RegisterMLAgent depends on ml_models seed table, Activities are 13 phases × 4 stages, Ancestors/Descendants need graph topology fixtures. All enum constants documented (Status:3, Priority:5, TaskType:5, Phase:13, Stage:4, Provider:4, Role:5, AgentKind:3).

author: David Huu Pham
text: Implementation complete. Created pkg/ptypes/testdata/fixtures.yaml (YAML fixture with 4 id_type axes × 6 namespace axes × 3 uuid axes + 8 error cases) and pkg/ptypes/parse_permutation_test.go (package ptypes_test, //go:embed, gopkg.in/yaml.v3). Tests generate 72 success permutations + 32 error permutations = 104 total. All quality gates pass: make fmt lint build + CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -race ./pkg/ptypes/. Committed at c092e57.

author: David Huu Pham
text: Implementation complete. Delivered: testdata/fixtures.yaml (325-permutation YAML with 3 axes: 5 task_types × 5 priorities × 13 phases, plus 3 namespace cases) and create_permutation_test.go (package providence_test, TestCreate_Permutations + TestCreate_NamespaceValidation). All 325 permutations and 3 namespace cases pass. Also fixed a pre-existing type error in internal/helpers/permutation_test.go (swapped range variables for map[string]bool). Quality gates: fmt + lint + test -race + build all pass. Commit: 728a7b8.

author: David Huu Pham
text:
Implementation complete. All quality gates pass.

Deliverables committed in HEAD (728a7b8):
- internal/helpers/testdata/fixtures.yaml: 6 graph topologies (isolated, linear_chain_3, tree, diamond, wide_shallow, deep_chain) with 22 per-node traversal queries
- internal/helpers/permutation_test.go: TestAncestors_GraphTopologies and TestDescendants_GraphTopologies driven by YAML fixtures via go:embed + gopkg.in/yaml.v3

Quality gates:
- go vet ./internal/helpers/...: PASS
- CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -race -count=1 ./...: all packages PASS (no regressions)
- CGO_ENABLED=0 go build ./...: PASS

No production code modified. Tests import actual production helpers.Ancestors / helpers.Descendants.

author: David Huu Pham
text: Implementation complete. Created internal/sqlite/testdata/fixtures.yaml and updated internal/sqlite/db_test.go with 5 YAML-driven permutation test functions: TestUpdateTask_YAMLPermutations (18 field-set cases), TestListTasks_YAMLPermutations (24 filter cases), TestRegisterMLAgent_YAMLPermutations (5 roles × 3 known models + 4 unknown models), TestStartActivity_YAMLPermutations (13 phases × 4 stages × 2 note variants = 104 cases), TestAgentKindMismatch_YAMLPermutations (3 kinds × 3 getters = 9 cases). Total: 184 passing YAML-driven sub-tests. All quality gates pass (fmt, vet, race, CGO_ENABLED=0 build).
